label: Artificial Intelligence
description: General field focused on building systems able to perform tasks requiring intelligence

label: Symbolic AI
description: AI approach based on explicit rules and symbolic reasoning

label: Knowledge Graph
description: Graph-based representation of concepts entities and relationships

label: Machine Learning
description: Field where models learn patterns from data

label: Linear Algebra
description: Mathematical foundation used in many AI models

label: Matrix
description: Rectangular array of numbers used in transformations

label: Dot Product
description: Operation combining two vectors into a scalar

label: Neural Network
description: Model based on connected artificial neurons

label: Activation Function
description: Function that introduces non-linearity in a neural network

label: Loss Function
description: Function used to measure prediction error

label: Backpropagation
description: Algorithm used to update neural network weights

label: Deep Learning
description: Machine learning approach based on deep neural networks

label: Large Language Model
description: Large model trained to understand and generate language

label: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
description: Method combining information retrieval with language generation
